name: Tortellini Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb. fresh tortellini, cooked and drained
1/2 lb. tri-color fusilli or rotini, cooked and drained
1 jar marinated artichoke hearts -- drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except for dressing and cheese.
2. Toss with vinaigrette dressing and Parmesan cheese.
